channel.title: Blog on James Wade
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on James Wade

item.title: How to Teach
item.description: These notes are based on talks given by Greg Wilson, founder of the Carpentries. The first is a talk he gave in April 2019 for RStudio.1 The second is an update to that talk from July 2021 on his personal YouTube channel.2 Lesson 1 - Design Curriculum for Learning Stages There are three stages of learners: novices, competents, and experts. The curriculum and teaching styles should be distinct for each learning stage.

item.title: A Beginning
item.description: I have an idea for lowering the barrier to learn new R packages. I have built a few private packages, but nothing of mine fits the bill for what I want to try. There are uncountable resources for getting started with R, and I do not have much to add there. If you defied the odds and found this before you found STAT 545, I highly recommend that course.
